meta_title: For Students: debugging with AI to Solve can't scale projects (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't scale projects. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debug at Scale: AI-Powered Workflow for Student Developers
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with unscalable projects. Master advanced AI debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional-grade software faster.
content.answer_block: Scaling issues often stem from technical debt and inefficient debugging loops. By integrating Antigravity for structural analysis and Claude Code for automated refactoring, you transform manual troubleshooting into a high-velocity development cycle. This workflow allows you to diagnose bottlenecks, optimize architecture, and deploy robust, production-ready features with professional precision.
content.intro:
The screen flickers. You’ve been staring at the same monolithic function for hours, a recursive mess that crashes the moment your database hits fifty concurrent users. You aren't just stuck; you're hitting the wall where amateur coding ends and professional engineering begins. This is the 'scaling ceiling'—a rite of passage for every developer that separates those who quit from those who ship.

But the era of manual debugging is over. By treating your IDE as an intelligent partner rather than just a text editor, you can dismantle complexity using AI agents that understand your codebase's intent. It is time to stop patching bugs and start architecting for growth. This is your blueprint to mastering the AI-driven debugging workflow.

steps.title: Architectural Bottleneck Identification
steps.description: Before fixing, you must localize. Use AI to scan for O(n^2) complexities or unoptimized database queries that kill scalability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase for performance bottlenecks. Identify functions with high cyclomatic complexity or inefficient data access patterns.

steps.title: Automated Dependency Refactoring
steps.description: Decouple your services to enable horizontal scaling. Use AI to suggest modular patterns that replace tight coupling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current module to be decoupled. Suggest a dependency injection pattern to improve testability and scalability.

steps.title: Unit Test Coverage Injection
steps.description: Scalability is impossible without regression protection. Automatically generate unit tests for every critical path identified in step 1.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate high-coverage unit tests for the identified performance bottlenecks using Jest. Focus on edge cases.

steps.title: Asynchronous Task Offloading
steps.description: Move heavy computations to background queues. Use AI to identify synchronous processes that should be event-driven.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify blocking synchronous operations and suggest an implementation using a message queue or background worker pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude architect --task 'move heavy compute to worker queue'

steps.title: Production-Ready Error Handling
steps.description: Implement robust error boundaries and logging to prevent silent failures during high load.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement comprehensive error boundaries and structured logging for all API endpoints to ensure observability under load.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'golden branch' before running AI refactors; use Claude Code to commit incremental changes.
Treat your AI prompts like documentation; save successful refactor patterns in a local markdown file for future projects.
Use Antigravity to generate sequence diagrams for complex logic before asking it to write the code.
Run Claude Code in 'dry-run' mode first to inspect the diffs before applying changes to your main codebase.
When debugging scale, focus on the database layer first; 90% of scaling issues are IO-bound, not CPU-bound.
content.next_steps: Once your project scales effectively, document your architectural choices and publish a 'Build Log' on your portfolio to demonstrate your engineering maturity to potential employers.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the tools to transform from a student coder into a high-level AI builder. Don't let your code ceiling define your career. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
